verses.text: Tua ciangin mite in, “I Zak thu kua in um thei ding ahi hiam? Hih bang thu-ah Topa' vangliatna khut kua in bangci muh theih ding ahi hiam

Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen kungno khat ahi a, lei keu sungah a om singzung khat bangin ahi zongin ama mai-ah khangto lel hi. Eite' et dingin amah in lim leh deihhuaina mel bangmah neilo a, eite' deih dingin hoihna neilo hi
Amah pen mite in simmawhin nusia a, gimna leh natna a thuak ahi hi. Mite in en nuamloin a mai uh a humsan uh mipa bangin amah kisimmawh a, eite in amah i thusim kei hi
“Amah in eite' natna teng thuakin, eite' gimna teng pua khin taktak hi. Ahi zongin eite in amah pen ama mawhna hangin Pasian in a gimsak, gimna a thuak bangin i ngaihsun hi
Ahih hangin eite' khialhna hangin amah kiliamsak a, eite' mawhna hangin amah kisatnim hi. Ama gim thuakna hangin nopna i ngah a, ama liamna hangin damna i ngah hi
Eite khempeuh in tuu bangin lam i khial khin a, eite khempeuh eimau san ciatah i pai khin hi. Topa in eite khempeuh' mawhnate ama tungah a suan hi
“Amah kinengniamin gimna a kithuaksak hangin amah kam khat beek paulo hi. Sa gote kiangah a kipaipih tuuno leh a mulmette mai-ah a kipaipih tuu a hamloh mah bangin amah kam khat beek paulo hi
Nenniamna leh thukhenna tawh amah kipaikhiatpih hi. A hingte' gam panin amah kikhenkhia-in, ama mite' khialhna hangin amah in gimna thuak hi, ci-in ama khang mite kua in thei ahi hiam
Amah in mawhna bawllo, zuau gen ngeilo napi-in, amaute in migilote tawh sihna a kibang, mihaute tawh hankhuk a kibang a bawlsak uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Ahih hangin amah a kisatnim ding pen Topa' deihna ahi hi. Amah in natna thuaksak hi. Mawhna hangin ama pumpi a kipiak ciangin amah in a suanlekhakte mu ding a, ama khan' a sau ding hi. Topa' deihna ama khutsungah pung ding hi
Amah in a gimna thaman mu-in a lungdam ding hi. A mawk thuak ahihlohna thei-in a thuman ka nasempa in mi tampi tak a dik suaksak ding a, amah in amaute' mawhnate pua ding hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah pen miliante tawh nate ka hawmsak ding a, amah in mihaute tawh nate a hawm ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sihna dongin a nuntakna piakhia a, khialhna a nei mite tawh a kisim khawm hi. Ahih hangin amah in mi tampi' mawhna pua a, khialhna a neite-a' dingin a thumsak hi.
